description: Gets information about an individual cast by passing in a Farcaster web URL or cast hash

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Cast identifier (It's either a URL or a hash)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
The query param accepted by the API. Sent along with identifier param.
url - Cast identifier is a url
hash - Cast identifier is a hash

parameters.name: viewer_fid
parameters.description: adds viewer_context to cast object to show whether viewer has liked or recasted the cast.
